name: CG-DETR
adaptation: Package-relative imports and device-agnostic tensor allocation.
Soccer-GMR CLIP+SlowFast and token-level CLIP feature dataset, including extension-free feature stems.
Binary relevant_clips constructed as the union of every relevant_window; null queries are all-zero.
MR-only criterion: QVHighlights saliency/ranking supervision disabled; moment-derived CG auxiliaries retained only for positive queries.
Empty-target-safe Hungarian/DETR losses and fully-null-batch-safe CG auxiliary losses.
Optional paper-style GMR existence adapter and official GMR evaluation runner.
